instruction: Change the macOS screenshot save location to ~/{DIR}.
source: cove-original (design 047 §9 slice 4); Tier-A defaults reads com.apple.screencapture location

args: mkdir -p "$HOME/{DIR}"; defaults write com.apple.screencapture location -string "$HOME/Desktop"; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
defaults write com.apple.screencapture location -string "$HOME/{DIR}"; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null; defaults read com.apple.screencapture location
